overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk along a futuristic city sidewalk dominated by a massive skyscraper with digital billboards. The scene features overcast skies, palm trees, pedestrians, and moderate vehicle traffic in a dense cyberpunk urban environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic city sidewalk with mega-tower and benches

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk past palm trees and seated pedestrians

notable_agents.action: seated on concrete bench holding a green drink

entered.detail: massive futuristic skyscraper with dark glass facade dominating the skyline
large illuminated screen on tower displaying a woman in red
line of palm trees along the sidewalk edge
concrete seating planters where pedestrians are resting
crisscrossing electrical wires above the street

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a futuristic city sidewalk with a massive skyscraper towering on the right. Palm trees line the left side while pedestrians sit on concrete benches. The camera walks forward steadily, maintaining a view of the mega-structure and its large digital billboard under overcast skies.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection approach with vehicle traffic

events.description: slight turn to the right while approaching the intersection crosswalk
multiple vehicles passing through the intersection from right to left

agents.ego_description: approaching the intersection while observing traffic and pedestrians crossing

notable_agents.action: black truck driving through the intersection

entered.detail: low-rise beige building with multiple windows across the intersection
marked pedestrian crossing lines on the asphalt
tall pole with traffic signals and orange construction flags

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches a busy intersection, turning slightly right toward the crosswalk. The mega-skyscraper recedes to the left background while a beige commercial building comes into view across the street. Vehicles move steadily through the intersection as the camera reaches the corner.

scene_state.functional_zone: street corner crosswalk with traffic control

events.description: traffic light changes from green to red for vehicles, pedestrians prepare to cross

agents.ego_description: waiting at the crosswalk corner for the traffic signal to change while observing passing vehicles

notable_agents.action: NCPO police officer standing near the traffic light pole

segments.scene_description: The camera stops at the intersection corner where pedestrians wait at the crosswalk. The traffic light changes from green to red, halting vehicle traffic. An NCPO officer stands near the signal pole as the scene focuses on the crossing area and the beige commercial building across the street.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person walk along a futuristic city sidewalk that transitions from the shadow of a massive skyscraper to a busy urban intersection. It begins by moving steadily past palm trees and pedestrians resting on concrete benches, with a towering mega-structure and its digital billboards dominating the right side of the frame under overcast skies. As the camera approaches a crosswalk, the perspective shifts slightly right, causing the skyscraper to recede into the background while a beige commercial building emerges across the street. The scene then opens up to a flow of steady vehicle traffic before the camera comes to a halt at the corner. Finally, the movement stops as the traffic light turns red, bringing the vehicles to a standstill beside an NCPO officer waiting at the signal pole.
